item.title: Michael Jackson: An American Tragedy - Series 1: Episode 1
item.description: Jackson rises from child prodigy to superstar, but strange behaviour clouds his success.

item.title: Twenty Twenty Six - Ian Fletcher: A Career
item.description: Ian Fletcher is in Florida facing his biggest challenge yet. But how did he get here?

item.title: The Young Offenders - Series 5: Episode 1
item.description: Conor and Jock meet an older couple, then accidentally take them hostage.

item.title: Inside Barlinnie - Series 2: Episode 1
item.description: Inmate JP overdoses and is rushed to hospital, and Norrie is suicidal.

item.title: Secret Garden - Series 1: 1. Oxfordshire
item.description: David Attenborough reveals the hidden lives of animals whose home is a river garden.

item.title: Pilgrimage - The Road to Holy Island: Episode 1
item.description: Seven celebrities make a pilgrimage through the stunning landscapes of north east England.

item.title: Babies - Series 1: Episode 1
item.description: Lisa and Stephen try to get pregnant again.

item.title: The Other Bennet Sister - Series 1: 1. Chapter 1
item.description: Mary Bennet hopes to win her family’s approval at her first ball.

item.title: Ambulance - Series 16: 1. Punched by a Patient
item.description: A night shift takes a violent turn as frontline staff come under attack from a patient.

item.title: Matthew Perry and the Ketamine Queen
item.description: Documentary examining actor Matthew Perry’s death and Hollywood’s ketamine drug network.

item.title: Race Across the World - Series 6: Episode 1
item.description: Five teams set off from Palermo on a 12,000km race to reach Hatgal in northern Mongolia.

item.title: Sort Your Life Out - Series 6: 1. It's Good to Be Back
item.description: Stacey and her team meet the Kings, a family with three grown-up kids.

item.title: Sort Your Life Out Unpacked - Janette Manrara: The Banana
item.description: Dilly unpacks Janette’s love of dancing, Aljaz and her grandmas pendant.

item.title: The Hunger Games: The Ballad of Songbirds & Snakes
item.description: Before his rise to power, young Coriolanus Snow mentors at the tenth Hunger Games.

item.title: The Capture - Series 3: 1. Don’t Look at the Camera
item.description: A devastating attack puts new boss of SO15, Rachel Carey, at the heart of a conspiracy.

item.title: Beyond Paradise - Series 4: Episode 1
item.description: The details of a novelist’s death eerily mirror his final novel. Coincidence or murder?

item.title: Hidden Assets - Series 3: Episode 1
item.description: A tragic raid in Dublin links to murders in Spain, setting CAB on the trail of a criminal.

item.title: The Repair Shop - Series 16: Episode 1
item.description: The team fix a historic women’s football scrapbook and a trailblazing ballerina's shoes.

item.title: Ronan Keating's Wild Atlantic - Series 1: 1. Cork
item.description: Ronan and his nephew Ruairí compete in the ancient Irish sport of road bowling.

item.title: Scotland's Home of the Year - Series 8: 1. East
item.description: Anna, Banjo and Danny search for Scotland’s Home of the Year in the east of the country.

item.title: The Trouble with KanYe
item.description: How did Kanye West go from celebrated artist to a megaphone for hate and division?

item.title: Storyville - André Is an Idiot
item.description: André is dying, but he is determined to do so with humour, curiosity and defiance.

item.title: Great British Menu - Series 21: 1. North West England: Starter and Fish
item.description: Four chefs compete for north west England with canapes, starters and fish dishes.

item.title: Crookhaven - Series 1: 1. Word to the Wise
item.description: Gabriel must decide whether to accept his place at a secret school for crooks.

item.title: Boarders - Series 3: Episode 1
item.description: It’s the boarders’ final term, but vandals unleash chaos. Who’s behind the destruction?

item.title: Trying - Series 3: 1. Home
item.description: Jason, resigned to Tyler being separated from his sister, treats the kids to a good time.

item.title: Michelle McManus Sings for the Pope
item.description: Michelle McManus travels to Rome on a mission to sing a new hymn in front of the Pope.

item.title: Harry Clark Goes to Rome
item.description: Harry Clark embarks on a personal pilgrimage to Rome, where he attempts to meet the pope.

item.title: Extraordinary Portraits - Series 5: 1. Honouring Remarkable Bravery
item.description: Honouring the bravery of the man who used a narwhal tusk to tackle an attacker.

item.title: Inside Britain's National Parks - Series 1: 1. New Forest
item.description: A look at the New Forest, a mosaic of heath, ancient woodlands, coastline and villages.

item.title: Captive Audience: A Real American Horror Story - Series 1: Episode 1
item.description: Seven-year-old Steven Stayner vanishes. His return seven years later stuns the nation.

item.title: Forensics: The Real CSI - Series 6: 1. Murdered after School
item.description: A teenager is the prime suspect when a 12-year-old boy is fatally stabbed in a park.

item.title: Muslim Matchmaker - Series 1: Episode 1
item.description: Matchmakers Hoda and Yasmin launch the dating journeys of three hopefuls looking for love.

item.title: Have I Got News for You - Series 71: Episode 1
item.description: Roy Wood Jr hosts, with guest panellists Armando Iannucci and Anushka Asthana.

item.title: The Claudia Winkleman Show - Series 1: Episode 4
item.description: Claudia is joined by James McAvoy, Rita Wilson, Gugu Mbatha-Raw and Russell Howard.

item.title: Big Cats 24/7 - Series 2: 1. Change Is Coming
item.description: The team returns to the Okavango Delta to catch up with old friends.

item.title: Men of the Manosphere
item.description: James Blake enters the manosphere, joining men seeking status, wealth and relationships.

item.title: Doctor Who (1963–1996) - Season 3: The Daleks' Master Plan: The Nightmare Begins
item.description: The TARDIS lands on Kembel and the Doctor goes to find help for the injured Steven.

item.title: Doctor Who (1963–1996) - Season 3: The Daleks' Master Plan: Devil's Planet
item.description: Having stolen the taranium core from the Daleks, the Doctor and his friends must escape.

item.title: Amandaland - Series 1: 1. House Party
item.description: After moving to So-ha (South Harlesden), Amanda tries to get in with some new parents.

item.title: Wallace & Gromit: Vengeance Most Fowl
item.description: Wallace invents a 'smart gnome' that has a mind of its own - or does it?

item.title: Puss in Boots: The Last Wish
item.description: Puss must beat a host of fairy-tale characters to the magical map of the Wishing Star.

item.title: Brooklyn
item.description: Drama set in the 1950s about an Irish immigrant who lands in Brooklyn and finds romance.
